section: TRILINGUAL (ARABIC, URDU AND PUNJABI IN PERSIAN CHARACTER)—RELIGION.
author: Muhammad Habibullah, Maulvi
title: Tafsir-i-Numani, Para-i-Panjum
gloss: The fifth chapter of the Quran, with translation in Urdu and commentary in Punjabi verse.
publisher: Mir Amir Bakhsh and Sons, Book-sellers
notes: Quran juz' 5 with Urdu prose translation and Punjabi verse commentary in one quarto — the trilingual tafsir serial continues (para 4 appeared in Q3); scripture layered across the region's whole linguistic stack.

author: Juwala Singh, Master
title: Writing Copy No. III, English, Gurmukhi, Urdu and Nagari
gloss: Writing Copy No. III, English, Gurmukhi, Urdu and Nagari.
copyright: M. Juwala Singh, Amritsar; No. 195, dated the 12th December, 1910.
notes: Section carries '(Designed for educational purposes.)'. Master Juwala Singh's third title this quarter (Urdu-in-Gurmukhi primer p21, English primer p33) — a four-script copybook, copyrighted: one soldier-teacher servicing the entire script ecology; the registry coins POLYGLOT for it.

printer_verbatim: The 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore.
title: The Punjab Record, Part II, Executive, Volume XLV, No. 2, for the quarter ending June, 1910
gloss: Edited by Lala Amar Nath, Lahore.
price: Annual subscription, Rs. 14; single copy, Rs. 2
copyright: The Proprietors, The 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 167, dated the 25th October, 1910.
notes: Law reporting as copyrighted commodity — the CMG Press registering the Punjab Record executive series; the fragmented pagination string preserved verbatim.

title: The Punjab Record, Part I, Judicial, Volume XLV, No. 8, for August, 1910
gloss: Edited by H. A. Herbert, Pleader, Chief Court Punjab.
price: Annual subscription, Rs. 14; single copy, Rs. 2
copyright: The Proprietors, the 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 163, dated the 25th October, 1910.
notes: Dash-continuation of s19; judicial series, English pleader-editor.

flags.issue: register No. partially cut at page edge; read as 163

title: The Punjab Record, Part I, Judicial, Volume XLV, Nos. 9 and 10, for September and October, 1910

price: Annual subscription, Rs. 14; single copy, Rs. 2
copyright: The Proprietors, the 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 176, dated the 21st November, 1910.

title: The Punjab Educational Journal for the month of August, 1910
gloss: Edited by the Reverend A. H. Hildesley, M.A. Pp. 121-144.
notes: Missionary-edited education journal printed by the Mufid-i-'Am — the pedagogy establishment's own periodical registered like any bazaar pamphlet.
